targetVariantStatus: Confirmed production target is Airbus A320 First-Officer cockpit. Exact ceo/neo/operator fit remains reference metadata and must be recorded per source before modeling.
sourceIdentity: Airbus official cockpit/commonality pages and license-screened web image references for A320-family flight deck layout, side-stick, FCU/glareshield, pedestal, overhead, and display relationships.
allowedUsage: Agent 1 web source discovery for Airbus A320 cockpit references
license and attribution screening before any local download
reference-pack ranking by cockpit section, viewpoint, operator, and A320 ceo/neo applicability
source manifest proposals for owner review before production modeling
forbiddenUsage: downloading or committing copyrighted images without a manifest record and compatible use terms
using simulator, add-on, or game cockpit screenshots as production geometry authority
mixing DC-9 or Model Y details into the Airbus scene group
starting production Airbus geometry before source authority and exact source compatibility are documented
variantCompatibility: Use A320-family references for first-pass source discovery. Label A319/A321/A320neo simulator or derivative sources as compatibility or presentation only unless the source proves exact A320 cockpit applicability.
